title: Create Refined
description:
Forge Modpack on 1.20.1, includes Create, Tardis Refined and Optimisation mods (Unlisted)

Own a TARDIS and explore the world with all the freedoms and abilities of the Create Mod and Supplemtaries. Find all sort of structures on this modpack.
body:
This modpack is a collection of mods I use on my modrinth server. It is meant to be unlisted and not be seen by the wider public.

Otherwise, it is a Create Centric Modpack (Forge) including:

  - Create + Addons
  - Farmer’s Delight + Respite
  - Tardis Refined + TriadTech + Regeneration
  - Create Structures + Terralith
  - Supplementaries + Supplementaries Squared
  - Many Optimisation Mods

Its features include:
- Tardis Refined: TARDIS, able to fly anywhere and has upgrades
- Create mod: Basically do everything
- Farmer's Delight: Make whatever food you want
- Supplementaries: Many 'accessories' items and blocks

Included but with Attribution (This is the Resource Pack):

[Vanila Tweaks (Resource Pack in Modpack)](https://vanillatweaks.net/)


**Other Mods not on Modrinth (Embedded):**


[Farmer's Respite](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-respite/files/5543547)

[Inventory Pets](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-pets/files/5776970)

[FTB Library](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-library-forge/files/5567591)

[FTB Chunks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-chunks-forge/files/5956390)

[FTB Ranks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-ranks-forge/files/4596742)

[FTB Teams](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-teams-forge/files/5267190)

[FTB Ultimine](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-ultimine-forge/files/5363345)

[FTB XMod Compact](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-xmod-compat/files/5257897)

[Cupboard](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard/files/5470032)
